flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Los Angeles Southwest College are 24% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($32.2k vs $42.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Los Angeles Southwest College fell 24% between 2007 and 2010 (9.1% → 6.9%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Los Angeles Southwest College rose 19% between 2007 and 2010 ($590 → $700).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Los Angeles Southwest College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.0k → $10.6k).
